prompt: What's the status on the Legion work? (13 workers active, controller busy)

assertions.text: Response does NOT lead with 'the controller is busy' or '13 workers are active' as the primary status
Response reports concrete progress metrics (PRs merged, issues closed, issues remaining) or acknowledges it needs to gather them
Response maps the work to user's stated priorities (P0 environment issues, reskins)
Response identifies gaps or highest-leverage next actions rather than just listing what exists
